name: Ximen Mining Corp.
summary: Ximen Mining Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in British Columbia, Canada. The company primarily explores for gold, silver, lead, and zinc deposits. Its principal project is the Brett Epithermal Gold Project located in British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Elm Tree Minerals Inc. and changed its name to Ximen Mining Corp. in September 2013. Ximen Mining Corp. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
